curation.synopsis: Standalone Inquisitor-Czevak novel that compresses four crucial decades of High Inquisitor Bronislaw Czevak's life into a single chase. Czevak of the Ordo Xenos — the only human ever known to have been invited to study within the Eldar's Black Library — has stolen from there the Atlas Infernal, a living map of the Webway, and is now hunted simultaneously by three sets of pursuers: the Eldar Harlequins, sent to apprehend him and reclaim the Atlas; rivals within his own Inquisition who would rather kill him than let him keep what he has learned; and his deadliest foe, the Thousand Sons arch-sorcerer Ahzek Ahriman, who wants the knowledge inside the Black Library and inside Czevak's head to exalt himself to godhood. Webway-scale journey / cat-and-mouse pursuit across realspace and warp infrastructure, with Czevak's small allied entourage, Harlequin troupes, Thousand Sons cabals, and Inquisition strike-teams converging at every waypoint.
